home-open-work-scope.assertion: Home open-work count equals the canonical available-work total.

home-my-active-scope.assertion: Home owned-active count equals the canonical MY_ACTIVE total.

work-primary-flow.assertion: A visible available quest reaches a canonical detail resource with a backend-published action.

notification-canonical-target.assertion: Actionable notification targets must resolve to canonical Web detail routes.
notification-canonical-target.finding: Repaired: stale or inaccessible quest/application references are now downgraded to an informational list destination, and the frontend follows backend destination metadata.

evidenceBoundary: Local authenticated runtime evidence only; this does not prove production data hygiene or cross-client parity.
